Our Legacy

16 Years on the Soil of Bahadurganj

From a humble beginning in 2008 to becoming the most trusted student lodge in Bahadurganj — this is the journey of Anti Lodge.

✦
🌱
2008 · THE BEGINNING
Anti Lodge is Founded
Talat Welfare Lodge opens its doors in Bahadurganj with a simple mission — provide safe, affordable housing to students coming from villages for coaching and studies.
📚
2012 · GROWTH
50 Students Milestone
Anti Lodge reaches its first 50 students. Word spreads across villages — parents trust us to take care of their children away from home.
🏆
2016 · ACHIEVEMENT
First Batch of Board Toppers
Students of Anti Lodge begin scoring 90%+ in Class 10 and 12 board exams. The study-focused environment proves its worth.
✅
2020 · TRUST
Government Job Achievers
Multiple Anti Lodge students clear government examinations — Railway, SSC, State Government jobs. Anti Lodge is now more than accommodation — it is a launch pad.
🌐
2024 · DIGITAL
Going Online — Serving Better
Anti Lodge launches its digital platform — website, WhatsApp support, Telegram channel. Making it easier for students and parents to connect from anywhere.
🚀
2026 · TODAY
200+ Students, Still Growing
Anti Lodge has now served 200+ students across 16 years. The mission remains the same — every student deserves a safe home away from home. Admissions for 2026 are now open.
Why Anti Lodge

Why 200+ Students
Choose Us

In 16 years, we have learned what students truly need — and we have built everything around that.

"When a student leaves their village and comes to a new city — the first thing they need is not just a room. They need safety, support, and someone who cares. That is what Anti Lodge is."
01
💰
Truly Affordable
Rooms from ₹650/month — the lowest price for quality student housing in Bahadurganj. No hidden costs, ever.
02
🔒
16 Years of Safety
Gate closes at 10 PM. 24/7 management presence. Hundreds of parents have trusted us with their children.
03
📚
Study-First Culture
Strict quiet hours. No parties, no distractions. Built for students who are serious about their exams and future.
04
📍
Prime Location
2–10 minutes walk from coaching centres, schools, market, hospital and bus stand. Every convenience nearby.
05
🤝
Community Spirit
Students from different villages form study groups, motivate each other, and build friendships that last a lifetime.
06
🏆
Proven Results
50+ board toppers. 15+ government job holders. Students clear NEET, SSC, Railway from Anti Lodge every year.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the monthly rent at Anti Lodge?▼
Rent starts at ₹650/month for triple sharing, ₹750 for double sharing, and ₹1500 for a single room. Electricity and water are included in all rooms. No hidden charges.
Is Anti Lodge safe for students from villages?▼
Yes, absolutely. Anti Lodge has been operating since 2008 — 16 years of safe, reliable accommodation. Gate closes at 10 PM, management is always available, and hundreds of parents have trusted us.
How do I book a room?▼
Click "Book a Room" — fill the form and your details will be sent directly to our WhatsApp. Our team confirms within 24 hours.
What documents are required for admission?▼
A valid ID proof (Aadhar Card preferred), school or coaching ID, and guardian contact number. Simple process — no hassle.
Are meals included in the rent?▼
Meals are not included, but affordable dhabas and canteens are within 2–5 minutes walking distance. Students have plenty of good, cheap food options nearby.
View All FAQs →
